name: Greek Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, garlic, lemon juice, oregano, cumin, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Add diced plum tomato and minced parsley; stir to combine.
3. Form the mixture into 4 patties about 3/4 inch thick.
4. Grill or broil the patties 4 inches from the heat for 3 minutes on each side for medium-rare.
5. Cut a slit in the top of each pita pocket bread and turn the cut-off piece with the round side down, tucking it inside to reinforce the bottom.
6. Place one grilled burger patty into each pocket along with a romaine lettuce leaf and paper-thin slices of red onion.
7. Spoon cilantro chutney over the burgers if desired.
Note: These hamburgers could be made with lean ground lamb instead. The exchanges would remain the same, but lamb adds 17 calories and 2 grams of fat (mostly saturated fat) per serving. Joslin Food Exchanges per serving: 3 MEDIUM/FAT MEAT EXCHANGES + 2 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGES
CAL: 346 PRO: 27; CAR: 26g; FAT: 15g (CALORIES FROM FAT 39%); FIBER: 2g; SODIUM: 285mg; POTASSIUM: 441mg.
